headline: Jacobs Solutions (J) Contract Momentum Puts Its Valuation Back In Focus
summary: Jacobs Solutions (J) stock is back in focus as investors weigh a string of new infrastructure contracts and upcoming third quarter earnings, with analysts projecting a higher diluted EPS figure year over year. See our latest analysis for Jacobs Solutions. At a share price of $129.49, Jacobs Solutions has recently seen a 7.04% 30 day share price return and a 27.82% three year total shareholder return. This follows a softer year to date and comes as new infrastructure and energy contracts are...

headline: Why Is J Stock Rising Today?
summary: Jacobs will spearhead the planning and approval process necessary to obtain regulatory approvals for the U.K.’s SMR projects, including community research and legal paperwork for the sites.

headline: Jacobs appointed by Great British Energy – Nuclear to support planning for new UK nuclear projects
summary: DALLAS, July 21, 2026--Jacobs selected by GBE–N to provide planning and consenting services for the proposed small modular reactors development in the U.K.

raw.headline: Jacobs appointed by Great British Energy – Nuclear to support planning for new UK nuclear projects

headline: Jacobs Solutions (J) Stock May Be A Bargain On Cash Flow But Full On Earnings
summary: Jacobs Solutions stock sits at an interesting point for valuation focused investors, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate suggesting the shares trade at a 36.0% discount while earnings based multiples paint a richer picture and the broader checks come out mixed. Over the past 3 years, Jacobs Solutions has delivered a 27.8% return, which makes the current valuation debate more about what comes next than about a recovery story. New long term framework and infrastructure...

headline: How Investors May Respond To Jacobs Solutions (J) Securing New Multi-Year Global Infrastructure Contracts
summary: In recent weeks, TransnetBW, National Highways and Naval Facilities Engineering Systems Command Washington have each selected Jacobs Solutions for multi-year, multidisciplinary frameworks and design contracts spanning energy grid modernization, transport infrastructure and U.S. military facilities. These wins expand Jacobs’ role across critical energy, transport and defense programs in Germany, the U.K. and the U.S., reinforcing its position as an integrated partner on complex,...
